title: How to clamp (limit) a value between a minimum and maximum
task: Force a number to stay within a range - anything below the floor becomes the floor, anything above the cap becomes the cap.
keywords: limit number between min and max google sheets

excel.note: MAX raises up to the floor; MIN caps at the ceiling.

explanation: MAX(A2,0) makes sure the value is at least 0; MIN(...,100) makes sure it's at most 100. A value of 150 is pulled down to the cap of 100. A value of -5 would be raised to 0, and anything already between 0 and 100 passes through unchanged.
